meta.description: Curated overrides to correct Wikipedia-sourced entries. Entries with status=expired are excluded from the dashboard. Entries with status=active confirm ongoing emergencies and boost confidence.

overrides.notes: Emergencies Act invoked Feb 14, 2022, revoked Feb 23, 2022 (9 days).
State of emergency declared Jan 5, 2022, lifted Jan 19, 2022.
State of emergency declared April 2022 during economic crisis, lifted after July 2022.
National emergency declared July 15, 2022 for extreme heat wave. Lasted ~2 days.
Health state of emergency declared May 2022 for monkeypox. No longer in effect.
State of emergency declared June 2022 during protests. Lifted after agreement.
State of emergency July 2022 in Karakalpakstan. Lifted within weeks.
State of emergency July 2022 for northern drought. Regional and temporary.
State of emergency July 2022 for forest fires. No longer in effect.
State of emergency August 2022 for catastrophic flooding. No longer in effect.

overrides.title: Martial law (extended 18 times since Feb 2022, currently until May 2026)
overrides.notes: Martial law extended until May 4, 2026 (18th extension). Continuous since Feb 24, 2022.

overrides.title: State of exception for gang crackdown (extended 48+ times since March 2022)
overrides.notes: Régimen de excepción in effect since March 27, 2022. Extended 48 times as of Feb 2026.

overrides.title: State of danger due to Ukraine conflict (extended repeatedly since May 2022)
overrides.notes: Veszélyhelyzet declared May 24, 2022, extended multiple times through 2025.

overrides.title: State of emergency due to Ukraine conflict (extended repeatedly since Feb 2022)
overrides.notes: State of emergency declared Feb 24, 2022, extended repeatedly through 2025.

overrides.title: State of emergency due to Russian security threat (extended since Feb 2022)
overrides.notes: State of emergency declared Feb 24, 2022, extended multiple times.
False positive: martial law has never been declared in Australia since federation in 1901. Wikipedia Martial_law article describes legal framework, not an active declaration.
Martial law declared Dec 3, 2024, lifted ~6 hours later on Dec 4, 2024. President Yoon subsequently impeached.
ICCPR derogation was COVID-related (June 2020 – June 2021). No current national state of emergency.
ICCPR derogation was COVID-related (March – July 2020). No current state of emergency.
ICCPR derogation was COVID-related (March – April 2020). Conflict situation is ongoing but the formal ICCPR derogation notification is stale.
ICCPR derogation dates to 2006, latest notification 2023. No confirmed current national state of emergency.

overrides.title: State of security emergency in Savanes region (extended since June 2022)
overrides.notes: State of emergency in Savanes region due to jihadist insurgency. Extended for 12 months starting March 13, 2026 by National Assembly.

overrides.title: Penitentiary state of emergency (extended through Dec 2025)
overrides.notes: Sector-specific penitentiary emergency extended through at least December 2025. Also flooding emergency in Chaco region declared April 2025.
